title: TROYSTA RUN for Troy. For Awareness. For Life.
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Families and trail...
bodyText:
[{"type":"intro_bold","text":"The race starts from the Trail Kiosk at Ground Zero in Arbour Road."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Families and trail runners are invited to lace up their shoes for the second TROYSTA RUN, taking place on Sunday, 22 February. A special event that celebrates the life of young trail runner, Troy Schofield, while giving back to the trails he loved.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Families and trail runners are invited to lace up their shoes for the second TROYSTA RUN, taking place on Sunday, 22 February. A special event that celebrates the life of young trail runner, Troy Schofield, while giving back to the trails he loved."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Choose between a fun 5km trail walk/run, perfect for families and beginners, or a more challenging 10km which follows the same route Troy ran in 2021 when he won the Junior MUT Lite."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The TROYSTA RUN was established after Troy, a local 18-year-old rising trail star, passed away unexpectedly on 1 August 2024 following a sudden and devastating 48-hour battle with bacterial meningitis (meningococcal). He was in his matric year and excited about the future ahead of him.","html":"The TROYSTA RUN was established after Troy, a local 18-year-old rising trail star, passed away unexpectedly on 1 August 2024 following a sudden and devastating 48-hour battle with bacterial meningitis (meningococcal). He was in his matric year and excited about the future ahead of him."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Troy’s greatest love was the outdoors, especially the Outeniqua Mountains and the trail running community within them.","html":"Troy’s greatest love was the outdoors, especially the Outeniqua Mountains and the trail running community within them."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Known for his determination, humility and respect for nature, Troy achieved remarkable success at a young age. In 2021, he became the youngest finisher of the gruelling 6 Peaks Challenge, completing it in an impressive 10 hours and 7 minutes.","html":"Known for his determination, humility and respect for nature, Troy achieved remarkable success at a young age. In 2021, he became the youngest finisher of the gruelling 6 Peaks Challenge, completing it in an impressive 10 hours and 7 minutes."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The TROYSTA RUN honours Troy’s life while serving a dual purpose, to raise awareness of bacterial meningitis and to support the trail running community that meant so much to him."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"All proceeds from the event go directly towards trail maintenance and security for the trails around George, helping to preserve these routes for future runners and families to enjoy.","html":"All proceeds from the event go directly towards trail maintenance and security for the trails around George, helping to preserve these routes for future runners and families to enjoy."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The race starts from the Trail Kiosk at Ground Zero in Arbour Road.","html":"The race starts from the Trail Kiosk at Ground Zero in Arbour Road."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Race options:","html":"Race options:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"10km trail run – R350 (start 08:00)5km trail run – R280 (start 08:30)","html":"
  • 10km trail run – R350 (start 08:00)
  • 5km trail run – R280 (start 08:30)
    • "},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Entries close on 5 February and no on-the-day entries will be accepted."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In addition to honouring Troy’s legacy, the event highlights the importance of meningitis prevention. Elective vaccinations are available to help protect loved ones from this serious disease.","html":"In addition to honouring Troy’s legacy, the event highlights the importance of meningitis prevention. Elective vaccinations are available to help protect loved ones from this serious disease."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Whether you are a seasoned runner or simply looking for a meaningful family outing, the TROYSTA RUN offers a chance to participate with purpose.","html":"Whether you are a seasoned runner or simply looking for a meaningful family outing, the TROYSTA RUN offers a chance to participate with purpose."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Follow the link to secure your entry now.","html":"Follow the link to secure your entry now."}]

images.alt: TROYSTA RUN for Troy. For Awareness. For Life.

teaser: The race starts from the Trail Kiosk at Ground Zero in Arbour Road.
featuredCaption: Known for his determination, humility and respect for nature, Troy achieved remarkable success at a young age.
